text: SURPRISE AND QUICK ACTION.
FIELD LATER: Three prongs, attaking at four lights.
First prong BEIDGENHEAD AT REINE
ASSAULT men and camps, use of land and army
personnel with main portion of island.
DESTROY ALL COMMUNICATIONS, telephone wire etc
and occupy POST OFFICE
spread out with bridghead and occupy town
SECOND PRONG Air Seaman to cut line of communication at
town ANDO to main land. EMU POINT
THIRD PRONG to take wireless station and light house
initial stages Cut off and destroy power station then
PANDAR - ANDO - REINE this please,
and further use of our engineers etc.
RESISTANCE: AT WIRELESS STATION LIGHTHOUSE complete surprise
GERMANS AT REINE NOT QUITE LIGHT BOOIS LIE
out Seaman 4 YES OF ENEMY
QUICKING 16 to 4-5.
FRIGHTENED,
ONE ESCAPED CAPTURED
CHEST HIGH IN FREEZING WATER
POPULATION Took in for Germans the Americans
outfits as BRITISH IRISH local.
Description of Norwegian
